title: cytisus × versicolor
intro: Cytisus × versicolor, also known as the hybrid laburnum, is a plant that is a cross between the common laburnum (Cytisus laburnum) and the French broom (Genista canariensis). The plant contains cytisine, a toxic alkaloid with medicinal properties that has been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Cytisus × versicolor include its potential to treat conditions such as asthma and bronchitis due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of fever and rheumatism. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations, including tinctures and infusions, although it is essential to exercise caution when handling it due to its toxicity.
